explanations.2: This pulls a lightweight Python image (version 3.11) that's smaller than the default because it only includes essentials.
explanations.9: The --no-cache-dir flag tells pip not to save downloaded packages locally, which saves space in the final image.
explanations.18: The --host 0.0.0.0 makes the app accessible from outside the container (not just from localhost), and we bind it to port 80 which was exposed on line 15.
